# Kesher AI Privacy Review Prompt

Use when a change touches AI profile coaching, match explanations, compatibility summaries, moderation summaries, safety scanning, prompt files, model routes, or AI fixtures/evals.

## Procedure

1. Identify AI feature and audience: member-facing, moderator-facing, admin/internal, or lab.
2. Classify inputs: public profile fields, private fields, questionnaire answers, hidden scores, moderation notes, reports/evidence, photos/media, location/address, consent state.
3. Reject forbidden exposure: raw questionnaire answers from another user, exact filters/dealbreakers, hidden ranking/taste signals, moderation notes, protected-trait inferences from photos, compatibility guarantees, invented traits, manipulative dating copy, auto-sent messages.
4. Require safe output: structured schema, normalized dimensions, uncertainty, no-guarantee language, user-safe wording, reviewable explanation.

## Output

Feature classification, allowed inputs, forbidden inputs, privacy risks, required changes, eval fixtures, pass/fail recommendation.
